for _ in range(M): x, y = MAP() w_x, r_x = balls[x-1] w_y, r_y = balls[y-1] if w_x >= 1 and r_x >= 1: balls[x-1][0] -= 1 balls[y-1][1] += 1 elif w_x == 0: balls[x-1][1] -= 1 balls[y-1][1] += 1 else: balls[x-1][0] -= 1 balls[y-1][0] += 1
if w_x >= 1 and r_x >= 1: balls[x-1][0] -= 1 balls[y-1][1] += 1 elif w_x == 0: balls[x-1][1] -= 1 balls[y-1][1] += 1 else: balls[x-1][0] -= 1 balls[y-1][0] += 1
elif w_x == 0: balls[x-1][1] -= 1 balls[y-1][1] += 1 else: balls[x-1][0] -= 1 balls[y-1][0] += 1
for i in range(N): if balls[i][1]: ans += 1
